shortDescription: Teams message reactions and chat intelligence via Microsoft Graph

linkConfig.description: Sign in to grant HelkinSwarm access to your Teams chats and reactions

tools.name: teams_get_message_reactions
tools.description: Retrieve the emoji reactions on a specific Teams chat message. Returns each reaction type (e.g. 👍 like, ❤️ heart) with the count, reactor display names, and timestamps. Requires the user's linked Microsoft account. Use the current conversationId if the user refers to 'this chat' — it is automatically injected as a hidden arg.

messageId.description: The Teams Graph API message ID (format: 1234567890123)

chatId.description: The Teams chat ID (format: 19:xxx@thread.v2). Omit to use the current conversation automatically.
